title: Welcome to Rajyash Food Rescue
description: A couple of details and you're in. You can change these later.
adminSetupBlurb: You've been invited as an admin — just confirm your details below and you'll get full coordinator access.
roleLabel: How would you like to help?

donor.title: Donate food
donor.blurb: I have surplus food to give — restaurant, event, or home.

volunteer.title: Volunteer
volunteer.blurb: I help hand out food to people at the drop-off points.

driver.title: Driver
driver.blurb: I drive (rickshaw) — I collect food and bring it to the drop-off points.
